things.name: Tivoli Gardens
things.description: Enchanting 19th-century amusement park and pleasure garden in the city centre

things.name: Nyhavn
things.description: Colourful 17th-century waterfront canal lined with brightly painted townhouses and cafes

things.name: The Little Mermaid
things.description: Hans Christian Andersen's beloved bronze statue on a rock in the harbour since 1913

things.name: Rosenborg Castle
things.description: Dutch Renaissance castle housing the Danish Crown Jewels and royal regalia

things.name: National Museum of Denmark
things.description: Denmark's largest museum covering Danish prehistory and Viking Age

things.name: Christiania
things.description: Freetown Christiania - autonomous neighbourhood with car-free streets and alternative culture

things.name: Louisiana Museum of Modern Art
things.description: World-class modern art in a stunning coastal setting 35km north of the city

things.name: Strolling Stroget
things.description: One of Europe's longest pedestrian shopping streets from City Hall to Kongens Nytorv

things.name: Copenhagen Zoo
things.description: One of Europe's oldest zoos with 3,000 animals including giant pandas

things.name: Designmuseum Danmark
things.description: Denmark's premier design museum charting 300 years of design and applied arts
